title: Data Type
text: Data Type Uniface data type of the parameter. The data type and implementation determine the other properties that can be set for this parameter. Applies To Signature Parameter Related Links Uniface Data Types Data types are classifications for data containers, such as fields, variables, parameters, and return values. They define the characteristics of the data and determine how the data is handled during processing and storage. Uniface has scalar data types and reference data types. Was this topic helpful?
